name: Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds
description_short: Los Angeles-based buyer of gold, diamonds, watches, and gemstones offering free appraisals and immediate cash payments since 2007.
description_long:
Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds has operated as a precious metals and luxury goods buyer in downtown Los Angeles since 2007. The company specializes in purchasing gold jewelry, loose diamonds, certified gemstones, and luxury watches from consumers looking to convert valuables into immediate cash. They operate a physical showroom at 617 S Hill Street in downtown LA and accept items from around the world, regardless of origin country.

The company offers a three-step selling process: scheduling a private consultation by phone or website, receiving an expert evaluation using current technology and market data, and receiving immediate payment via cash, bank transfer, or check. They advertise free, no-obligation appraisals and claim to base pricing on current global market data and industry expertise. All evaluations are performed by certified professionals according to their website.

Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds differentiates itself through promises of transparency, confidentiality, personalized service, and an educational approach that explains valuation methodology to sellers. Customer reviews on Google highlight specific staff members (Navid and Boby) for straightforward dealings, fair pricing, and respectful service. The company emphasizes that transactions are private and information is never shared with third parties.

As a jewelry and precious metals buyer, the company operates within the pawn-shop category but does not offer collateral-based lending—it purely purchases items outright for cash. Consumers should understand that while the company promises fair market value, actual offers depend on current precious metals spot prices and the authenticity/grade of items, which can fluctuate. The business model relies on accurate expert appraisals, making the expertise and certifications of their evaluation team a critical factor in fair dealing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free, no-obligation appraisals with no hidden fees or pressure tactics
Immediate payment options including cash, bank transfer, or check on the same day
Certified professional evaluators who explain their valuation process transparently
Accepts items from all countries and sources, including inherited or international purchases
Confidential transactions with privacy protections and no third-party information sharing
Personalized service with flexible appointment scheduling to accommodate customer schedules
Google reviews praising specific staff (Navid, Boby) for fairness and straightforward dealings
cons: Offers are based on current spot prices for precious metals, which fluctuate daily and may differ from customer expectations
No information provided about how they verify authenticity of diamonds or gemstones or what certifications they accept
Physical location limited to downtown Los Angeles only, requiring in-person visits for appraisals and transactions
No details on pricing methodology or benchmarks provided beyond vague reference to 'global market data'
No information about insurance, theft protection, or liability during the appraisal process
best_for: Los Angeles residents with inherited jewelry, gold, diamonds, or luxury watches seeking quick cash conversion
People clearing out jewelry boxes or downsizing without attachment to specific pieces
Owners of high-end watches (including Rolex) looking for transparent, fair-market valuations
diagnosis: Cash 4 Gold & Diamonds is best for Los Angeles residents who own precious metals, diamonds, or luxury watches and need immediate cash without ongoing financial obligations. The main caveat is that offers fluctuate with daily precious metals spot prices, and success depends entirely on the expertise and honesty of their in-house appraisers—there is no independent verification mechanism mentioned on their website.
services: Loose diamond and certified gemstone appraisal and buying
Luxury watch evaluation including Rolex and other brands
Free expert appraisals with no obligation
Immediate cash payment with multiple payout options
Valuation based on current global market data
Acceptance of items from international sources
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 617 S Hill St, Los Angeles, CA 90014
